titleStmt.title: SII 40.248: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 248. (A.R. No. B. 293 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in the compound of the Sakalēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1169, Uttarāyaṇa Saṅkrānti.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Sakalēśvara at Māvundala in Koṇḍapaḍumaṟa by Sādamu Māramarāju of Harita-gōtra, who was the lord of Amutunūripura and a subordinate of Kōṭa Bēṭa-Narēndra, for the merit of his parents and himself. The above gift was entrusted to Peda-Nāgadēva and China-Nāgadēva, sons of Nāraparāju, for providing ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta guṇagaṇālaṁkāra para
hitanijācāra brahmakulavā¨rddhiva¨rddhana sudhāka
ra vidvajanamukha kamala divākara naya vinaya cā
rucāritra haritagōtra pavitrayupāmacā
ṇaukya sūṁḍrita vākya paranārīharamēra na
gadhīra sujanavana vasaṁta vāra kāṁtā jaya
ṁtta kōṭa bētanarēṁdrakā¨ryya khaḍga sahā
parākramaḍaina tama Amutunūri puravarādhīśva
ra vibhavāmaraśvara śrī sakalēśvaradēva divya śrīpā
dapadmārādaka nāmādi samasta praśasti sahita
ṁ śrīmatusādamu māramarāju śakava¨rṣa
ṁbulu 1169 Agunēṁṭi Uttarāyana(ṇa) saṁkrā
ṁtti nimityamunaṁ goṁḍḍapaḍumaṭilōni mā
maṁḍala śrī sakalēśvara mahādēvarakuṁ dama
tallidaṁḍrulakuṁ danaku dha¨rmmā¨rttamugā saṁdhya
kaliveṭṭi Akhaṁḍavatti dīpaṁbanakiccina
goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni yī dēvara stānāpati
nāraparāju koḍkulu pedanāgadēvaṁḍu cinanā
gadēvaṁḍu damaputrānu vitrika mācaṁdrā¨rkkamu
gā dēvaradīpaṁbunaku nityamāneṁḍu nēyi voyaṁgala
vāṁḍu Āratula dīpālaku sōleṁḍu divyakāla
ku sōleṁḍu lōpali dīpānaku davveṁḍu . svadattaṁ pa
radattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭivaruṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣā(ṣṭā)yāṁ jāyatē krimi . jalaruha ga¨rbhavaṁ
śuṁḍagu sādamumārani yaṭṭi putruniṁ jē
lumagaṁgāṁci rēniṁgula kharuṁḍaṁḍrugāka
bhūjanulu gala jaramiṁḍilō baṁgaḍuṁgaṣṭuṁgani
ṣṭavivērasūnyaniṁbālutulu gāṁcirēni
ya suputrakuṁḍaṁḍre ceppaviṁḍra . pōtā
cāri reṁḍavu manumaṁḍu veṟapōtārāju
vrālu
Digital edition of SII 40.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
